nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as direct source of ready-made ideas
nodes.grounding_span: I mostly utilize AI for any brainstorming throughout the process

nodes.label: AI as compromise to creative integrity
nodes.grounding_span: I always want to make sure that I am not sacrificing my creative integrity

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI presenting incorrect information regarding mechanics, rules

nodes.label: Preserving personal creativity
nodes.grounding_span: amazing human creativity that is likely irreplicable

nodes.label: Creative integrity and human artistry
nodes.grounding_span: I enjoy what I do and I would not want to fall into the habit of no longer using my own creativity

nodes.label: Accuracy and factual reliability
nodes.grounding_span: I do not think that AI is at a level where it is reliable enough

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and human expression
nodes.grounding_span: amazing human creativity that is likely irreplicable

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as creative block breaker
nodes.grounding_span: It definitely helps me avoid feeling completely stuck before I even begin

nodes.label: Concern about AI's ethical risks
nodes.grounding_span: I felt very conflicted about it, as usual

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I hope that people do not end up overutilizing AI

nodes.label: Cautious skepticism toward AI reliability
nodes.grounding_span: I hope that chatbots are able to improve reliability and potentially be better at providing references

nodes.label: Iterative synthesis and recombination of AI outputs
nodes.grounding_span: combining several of the ideas that the AI model provides or using those ideas to spark a different vision

nodes.label: Domain-based boundary setting — separates creative from non-creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I put a lot of effort into ensuring that I am still in control of the creative decisions
